tweets.content:
Operation Sindoor reflected India’s firm response against terrorism and an unwavering commitment to safeguarding national security: Indian PM Modi's message on one year anniversary of India's counter terrorism operation inside Pakistan

Narendra Modi (@narendramodi)

A year ago, our armed forces displayed unparalleled courage, precision and resolve during #OperationSindoor. They gave a fitting response to those who dared to attack innocent Indians at Pahalgam. The entire nation salutes our forces for their valour.

Operation Sindoor reflected India’s firm response against terrorism and an unwavering commitment to safeguarding national security. It also highlighted the professionalism, preparedness and coordinated strength of our armed forces. At the same time, it showcased the growing jointness among our forces and underlined the strength that India’s quest for self-reliance in the defence sector has brought to our national security.

Today, a year later, we remain as steadfast as ever in our resolve to defeat terrorism and destroy its enabling ecosystem.

BREAKING: ‘Vande Mataram’ To Get Same Status As National Anthem

The Union Cabinet has reportedly approved a proposal to place “Vande Mataram” on the same legal footing as the National Anthem, “Jana Gana Mana.”

Under the proposed amendment to the Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act, acts of disrespect or obstruction during the singing of Vande Mataram could attract the same penalties currently applicable to the National Anthem.

Composed by Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay, the song played a major role in India’s freedom movement and is marking its 150th anniversary.
